summary: Testing completed for Match Sorting and Match Detail features. All new features working correctly. Backend API /api/match/{match_id} returns correct data. Frontend match detail modal displays all required information. Existing bet slip and football-live functionality verified working.

minor.issue: Some cricket matches from 2027 appear after 2026 matches due to data inconsistency in database. Sorting logic is correct but data spans multiple years.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Match sorting and detail modal features fully tested. Backend /api/match/{match_id} endpoint working. Frontend modal shows league, teams, date/time, format, status, venue, odds with Back/Lay buttons, and 'Go to Full Exchange' navigation. Bet slip functionality verified. Football-live page unchanged and working.

match_sorting.cricket_sorted_ascending: PASS - Matches sorted by commence_time ascending
match_sorting.football_sorted_ascending: PASS - Matches sorted by commence_time ascending
match_sorting.live_matches_first: PASS - Live matches appear at top

match_detail_modal.opens_on_click: PASS - Modal opens when clicking match row
match_detail_modal.shows_league_name: PASS - League name displayed in header
match_detail_modal.shows_team_names: PASS - Home vs Away team names displayed
match_detail_modal.shows_venue: PASS - Venue field displayed (TBD if not available)
match_detail_modal.shows_match_odds: PASS - Match Odds section with Back/Lay buttons
match_detail_modal.back_lay_buttons: PASS - 2 Back and 2 Lay buttons visible
match_detail_modal.loading_state: PASS - Loading spinner shown while fetching

existing_functionality.bet_slip: PASS - Opens on odds click, shows stake input, potential profit
existing_functionality.football_live_page: PASS - Page loads with all market sections
